name: evo-core
description: Verified engineering knowledge as axioms. Delivers precise solution cartridges to AI flagships, eliminates hallucinations, auto-fills knowledge gaps during sleep mode.

auth.description: Get your free API key at https://evo-core.io

tools.name: handshake
tools.description: Register flagship, establish session, get HMAC token

tools.name: concierge
tools.description: Interview flagship about task, stack, constraints

tools.name: query
tools.description: Get solution cartridge: verified symbols for the task

tools.name: step_done
tools.description: Report completed step, unlock next step

tools.name: result
tools.description: Submit result for YMS-MMM verification and archiving

tools.name: hook_reply
tools.description: Answer hook question about new knowledge
